channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: FDA-approved drug may boost immunotherapy against rare liver cancer
item.description: Researchers found that a rare liver cancer evades immunotherapy by luring immune T cells away from the tumor and trapping them in nearby fibrous tissue.

item.title: Scientists discover how a single cell builds a brain with 170 billion cells
item.description: How does a single cell build a brain with billions of precisely organized neurons? Researchers suggest that brain cells use their lineage—their cellular history—to guide development.

item.title: Ancient Sardis becomes a UNESCO World Heritage site after 70 years of excavation
item.description: After nearly seven decades of excavation, the legendary ancient city of Sardis has been designated a UNESCO World Heritage Site.

item.title: NASA's Lucy finds a wobbling peanut-shaped asteroid with signs of ancient water
item.description: NASA's Lucy spacecraft discovered that asteroid Donaldjohanson is a wobbling, peanut-shaped relic from a violent collision, slowly reshaped by...
